post.summary: Send a single-turn prompt to Claude

context.description: Optional context to provide alongside the prompt

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Claude response with model info and token usage

413.description: Prompt or context exceeds the 5 MB content limit

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (10 requests per minute)

401.description: Current user is not logged in

post.summary: Send a multi-turn conversation to Claude

options.description: Optional model parameters (temperature, top_p, top_k, stop_sequences)

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Claude response with model info and token usage

400.description: Messages array is missing or empty

413.description: Combined message content exceeds the 5 MB content limit

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (10 requests per minute)

401.description: Current user is not logged in

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Claude summary with model info and token usage

413.description: Content exceeds the 5 MB content limit

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (10 requests per minute)

401.description: Current user is not logged in

post.summary: Analyze a Nextcloud file with Claude (vision for images, document for PDFs, text for others)

filePath.description: Path to the file within the user's Nextcloud storage

prompt.description: Instruction or question about the file

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Claude analysis with model info and token usage

400.description: No filePath provided or prompt is invalid

404.description: File not found at the given path

413.description: Prompt exceeds the 5 MB content limit

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (10 requests per minute)

401.description: Current user is not logged in

model.description: Preferred Claude model ID (leave empty to use admin default)

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

401.description: Current user is not logged in

404.description: File not found at the given path

post.summary: Save admin-level settings (API key, model, token limits, timeout)

api_key.description: Anthropic API key for the instance

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

401.description: Current user is not logged in

403.description: Logged in account must be an admin

post.summary: Test the current or provided admin configuration by sending a live request to Claude

api_key.description: API key to test (uses saved key if empty)

model.description: Model to test (uses saved model if empty)

max_tokens.description: Max tokens for the test request

timeout.description: HTTP timeout for the test request

parameters.name: OCS-APIRequest
parameters.description: Required to be true for the API request to pass

200.description: Test request completed; see success field for result

400.description: No API key available or the test request failed

401.description: Current user is not logged in

403.description: Logged in account must be an admin

post.summary: Execute an OCC command and return the output
